reviews.review_description: My friends and I play this a lot and it’s a great game and all but why do you have to shutdown the game on may 1st everyone bought the game with their own money we all think you should make this game a standalone game so we can play it more I’m telling you this sucks what your doing to me and all of my friends I mean it really sucks and hurts all of us and even the people who buy it now and don’t know what is going on so please make it a STANDALONE GAME PLEASE ALL OF MY FRIENDS LOVE THIS GAME JUST MAKE IT STANDALONE AND I WILL NEVER DO THIS AGAIN OK PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE

The game is a lot of fun, gunplay is simple but addictive, each weapon serves a purpose and allows for some diverse akimbo combos.

Zombies are fun to shoot and can be deadly if you’re careless. Also the uniqueness of the Vials attached to them serving as critical hit spots adds some strategy beyond aiming for the head.

The game is cheaper than a McDonalds Big Mac meal in 2025, it’s well worth the price tag of £5.99. Fun alone or with friends.

This zombie shooting game is by far the best one out there in VR I recommend it to everyone . Get ur friends and shoot as many zombies that u can .but don't get left behind when the evac chopper comes  .good luck and see u in the game  .I dare u . Lol
Lack of updates and player base make this game unplayable.

Just bought the game great graphics, lots of different levels to play, various guns to choose from. Great to interact with other users on the game and great fun playing with your mates running around together shooting zombies. All action and fun.
Mark my words when I say this game is a masterpiece, IT IS. So much action - which I like - great with friends. Everything is amazing.

It ok… definitely confusing what u r supposed to be doing and the aim isnt great on the guns but its still an ok game to play… probably shouldn’t b that much money but atleast they have a free trial first i wish all games on mega quest had a free trial they probably would get more people to buy the games that way….
It's pretty great it's better with friends

I’ve had this game on my wishlist for some time now, and with the Halloween sale, i decided to finally check it out.

I really can’t help but say that I am disappointed, especially given the reviews. I can understand why some people like this game, but I really don’t understand the rave reviews. If you’ve played similar games like After the Fall or Left 4 Dead, that is the formula here. Shoot a wave of zombies, move to the next checkpoint, repeat 10 times, and then evacuate. I love this type of game, but everything here with The Flip feels half-baked and unoptimized. The frame rates and animations are not smooth, levels are rather simple and bland, sound effects and voice acting have no punch or polish, the gun aiming feels off, and I felt the pistols or SMG were more satisfying and effective than a grenade launcher or a point-blank shotgun. And the enemies are (pardon the pun) rather brainless.

Also, I don’t know if it’s because we are close to Halloween or what, but I expected the lobbies to have at least some semblance of activity, especially with the sale on the game right now. There was exactly one other person in the lobby, and I couldn’t tell if their mic was broken or if they could hear me,  but needless to say I had to play the whole mission by myself while they wandered off in the wrong direction.

Buyer beware, I think the reviews on this one are misleading.

reviews.review_title: THIS GAME CONVINCED ME IN FAKE RATINGS.
reviews.review_description: I play a lot of VR GAMES ALONG WITH PC, AND CONSOLE GAMES. USUALLY RATINGS MAKE SENCE TO WHERE WHEN I SEE HOW PEOPLE HAVE RATED THE GAME OVERALL THAT EVEN IF I DONT END UP LIKING THE GAME AS MUCH AS MOST PEOPLE I AM STILL ABLE TO UNDERSTAND HOW THE GAME GOT THE RATING IT DID. HOWEVER FOR SOME TIME IVE NOTICED THIS JUST NOT HAPPINING WITH THE QUEST GAMES IVE BEEN BUYING. NOT TO TRY BEING MEAN OR OVER REACT TO  THINGS , HOWEVER THIS GAME IS A TERRIBLE GAME! IVE PLAYED MY SHARE OF BAD GAMES BEFORE LIKE THE LORD OF THE RINGS GOLUM OR HOWEVER ITS SPELLED BUT THIS IS RIGHT UP THERE WITH THAT GAME. HOW A GAME COULD BE LIKED THATS THIS REPETATIVE , TERRIBLE GRAPHICS(EVEN THOUGH IVE PLAYED GREAT GAMES BEFORE WITH ALSO TERRIBLE GRAPHICS). NOTHING NEW AS ITS JUST A FEW IDEAS TAKEN FROM OTHER GAMES BUT DONE FAR WORSE, WEAPONS THAT SUCK AND THAT ARE UNIMMERSIVE DUE BEING SO BASIC AND WITHNO MANUAL RELOADING OPTION ALTHOUGH SHOULD BE DEFAULT ESPECIALLY FOR THIS BEING VR WHERE ITS SOMETHING YOU COULD ONLY DO IN VR INSTEAD OF WATCHING IT DONE IN REGULAR GAMING. JUST LACK OF WEAPONS ON A LEVEL IVE NEVER SEEN BEFORE. I MEAN I THOUGHT FOR SURE THAT ONE OF THE GUN BOXES WOULD OFFER SOMETHING NEW BUT NOPE, NOT EVEN ATTACHMENTS FOR YOUR WEAPONS, OR ANYTHING MEANINGFULL TO FIND OR EARN OR RECEIVE FOR COMPLETION OF THE MISSIONS YOU COMPLETE. JUST BORING RINSE REPEAT GAMEPLAY WITH AI THAT JUST MOVES ENEMIES DIRECTLY AT YOU. THIS GAME DID IT FOR ME THOUGH, AS I DO NOT BELIEVE THAT ITS EVEN SLIGHTLY POSSIBLE TO HAVE EARNED SUCH A HIGH RATING WHERE AS RIGHT NOW IT SITS AT A 4.6.    A 4.6 !!!!!!!!!!! NO WAY THATS POSSIBLE.!! NOT A CHANCE. EVERYONE WOULD HAVE TO BE ON DRUGS TO HAVE GIVEN IT SUCH PRAISE. IF THATS THE CASE THEN I RECANT THIS REVIEW AND I WISH YOU ALL THE BEST. IN FACT PLEASE TELL ME HOW I CAN GET MY HANDS ON SOME AS WELL FOR ID LOVE TO PLAY A REALLY GOOD GAME THATS GOT A 9 OUT OF 10 OR HIGHER RATING AND EXPERIENCE IT AS A 15 OUT OF 10  GAME RATING. YOU GET THE POINT.

developer_response.body:
Hi there Greg,

Thanks for your candid feedback (however please note we don't pay for reviews at all). We’re sorry to hear The Flip didn’t resonate with you. We value your insights as they help us improve. If you have any further suggestions, we’d love to hear them.

Best regards, The Flip Dev Team.

reviews.review_description: This game makes me question why I spent so much for a quest 3. This is ps2 graphics with absolutely no nostalgia. Horrible to the core, RE4 and Saints & Sinners takes a dump on this if you have a zombie killing urge. I'm actually mad that 20 votes before me put 5 stars. Ridiculous.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback on 'The Flip'. We're sorry to hear that the game did not meet your expectations. We strive to create experiences that resonate with a wide audience, and we take all feedback seriously as it helps us improve. We'll be continuously working on updates and improvements, so we hope you'll give 'The Flip' another chance in the future. Thank you for time.

reviews.review_description: Good Arcade action bat fast boring. Hardly any weapons, no additional items etc. nothing to unlock apart from some clothing, lots of potential but not far behind after the fall... Sry

10/10 super fun would buy again

reviews.review_description:
I highly recommend this game if you like zombie games, multiplayer, and carnage! Here are some suggestions to the devs 

1. Boss fights

2. Matchmaking 

3. More zombie types like a zombie spitter that spits poison

4. Zombie spider 🕷️ 

That’s all your game needs to be perfect

P.S you don’t have to add these 🙂

developer_response.body:
Hey maydayvr.2022, thanks for the feedback!

Multiplayer: To join, a multiplayer game you have a few options: 1) hang out in the lobby waiting for group to come back from a session or 2) join with friends or 3) enter the app when we have one of our weekly events - you'll find tons of people online then.

Regarding your connection issue: It sounds like you might have had a connection issue. Try restarting the game or checking your internet.

P.S. We appreciate the potential 5 stars!

reviews.review_description: Great game fun fast pace definitely a challenge and something different. I would definitely recommend this game especially to spend quality time with others(dad)(hubby) a great game to bond and learning something new.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, Shorty1988! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying The Flip! It's awesome to know that our game is helping you bond with your loved ones, that's exactly the kind of experience we hoped to create. Keep flipping and having a blast, and if you ever have any suggestions or feedback, we're all ears - ie let us know what we can do to get 5 stars! ;P Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Great job 👏 there should be a difficulty level, because it's too easy even on your own! It needs a challenge, but it's a fantastic game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the shout-out! We're on it - tougher challenges are coming. Keep your skills sharp, and thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Love the game. Wish the guns held more ammo than they do.
I can’t play this game without screaming! It’s immense! Love it when the chopper takes off. So cool playing with mates

developer_response.body:
We love your enthusiasm! Thrilled to hear you're having a blast, especially during the chopper scenes. It's great to know that playing with friends is adding to the fun. Thanks for sharing your excitement!

Cheers, The Flip Dev Team

reviews.review_description: Best game I’ve played on my quest 2 really recommend it lots of levels play with friends and more
